evals.name: us-sector-rotation
evals.prompt: 帮我看看美股各板块的轮动情况，哪些板块有动量优势
evals.expected_output: Runs sector scan with US SPDR ETFs, uses SPY as benchmark, analyzes momentum leaders/laggards with relative strength context

assertions.name: uses-spdr-etfs
assertions.text: Uses US SPDR sector ETFs (XLK, XLF, XLE, XLV, XLI, XLY, XLP, XLB, XLRE, XLU)

assertions.name: momentum-ranking
assertions.text: Provides ranked momentum scores with leaders and laggards identified

assertions.name: quadrant-analysis
assertions.text: Includes momentum × trend quality quadrant classification (strong/weak × accelerating/decelerating)

assertions.name: chinese-response
assertions.text: Responds in Chinese matching the user's language

evals.name: tech-subsector-comparison
evals.prompt: I want to compare tech sub-sectors — semiconductors vs software vs cybersecurity vs cloud. Which has the best momentum right now?
evals.expected_output: Uses thematic ETFs like SMH, IGV, HACK, SKYY with XLK or QQQ as benchmark, provides relative strength comparison

assertions.name: thematic-etfs
assertions.text: Uses appropriate thematic ETFs (SMH for semis, IGV for software, HACK for cyber, SKYY for cloud)

assertions.name: relative-strength
assertions.text: Compares relative strength across sub-sectors with clear winner identified

assertions.name: acceleration-context
assertions.text: Discusses momentum acceleration or deceleration to assess trend sustainability

evals.name: global-market-comparison
evals.prompt: Compare US, Japan, Germany, and China equity markets. Where should I be overweight?
evals.expected_output: Uses country ETFs (SPY, EWJ, EWG, FXI or similar) with appropriate benchmark, discusses geographic rotation

assertions.name: country-etfs
assertions.text: Uses country-level ETFs (e.g. SPY, EWJ, EWG, FXI/MCHI) for each market

assertions.name: overweight-recommendation
assertions.text: Provides clear overweight/underweight recommendation with momentum-based rationale

assertions.name: macro-context
assertions.text: Discusses macro or catalyst context behind regional momentum differences

evals.name: hk-sector-scan
evals.prompt: 港股各板块现在怎么样？科技、金融、地产、消费哪个强
evals.expected_output: Uses HK sector ETFs (3067.HK, 3033.HK, 3012.HK, 3040.HK) with 2800.HK benchmark, Chinese response

assertions.name: hk-etfs
assertions.text: Uses HK sector ETFs (3067.HK for tech, 3033.HK for financials, 3012.HK for property, 3040.HK for consumer)

assertions.name: hk-benchmark
assertions.text: Uses 2800.HK (Tracker Fund) as benchmark for relative strength

assertions.name: sector-verdict
assertions.text: Clearly identifies which HK sector has strongest/weakest momentum

assertions.name: chinese-response
assertions.text: Responds in Chinese matching the user's language
